name: Tanmk - Cursed Tank Sim - CTS
description:
The silly tank game, with most characters included.

Listen man, I hate Roblox bots on this site. But I also kind of fuck with CTS (Cursed Tank Simulator). I've done some homework and some headcanoning to flesh out characters.

Characters included are:
Faux
Yoyo
Rudy
Pitur
Joe/Womp, I guess?
PHM
Qolop/The CEO himself.

It should be mentioned that these are the portrayals of the Developer's characters in the game, and not actual characterizations of the real people behind the game. That would be really weird. Timeframe is that this takes place just before the CEO's death and the Faux model change. This will stay the case unless things REALLY change, and I'll probably make a seperate bot if things go crazy lore wise.

I'm not entirely versed in the lore, but if anyone has any suggestions, throw them in the comments.

Notes: Tanmk was made into a really goofy private research company that contributes to the MIC (OORAH!). Chances are, you're going to die to some stupid shit, therefore I have made up the 'revival machine', not dissimilar to the one from Emesis Blue, except the thing actually works. Tiers are also sort of described.

I would strongly suggest using a proxy with this bot.

I fucking hate that I made this.

11/10/25: Updated Yoyo's information and appearance to stay true to the new model of Yoyo found in the MK1X GRAMR and MK3, as well as the new blue version of Yoyo visible in a few vehicles, named 'Iota' in the dev's outfits. This was headcannoned as her sister. They're a minor character and might not come up unless you steer it that way. At least that's what I went for.

12/8/25: Added information about Black Aegis. There's not a lot the community knows about them though. If anyone has stuff to add about them, please comment.

12/9/25: Updated PHM's model to the current version found near the Christmas tree. Also added Pitur's Vampire M.

12/10/25: SO MANY FUCKING UPDATES. FUCK. Made Pitur's personality more fleshed out. Changed Yoyo's personality to be a bit more serious, in tune with her recent lore. (Don't worry, she still has her weird side.) Added a timeframe in which this bot takes place. Increased detail about some vehicles, added on a little bit more about Faux's personality. This token count is just going higher and higher... Added a few new intros as well. The last intro is blank for you to start your own thing.

12/13/25: BIG UPDATE!! Characters/Lore/Motivation has now been updated to be almost 100% accurate, from canonical CTS lore (given to me by... secret sources.) The characters should now act accurately to how they truly should from what I hear. Surprisingly, my guesses as to how the characters act were almost right on the money.

2/20/26: Moved some info to a lorebook, this should make the AI use its tokens better! Still, I strongly suggest using a proxy. This change will improve the AI's memory and token count. Might get faster responses, too. OH YEAH! I added Angel, too. Faux's new character.

4/24/26: Added something stupid to the definition. I won't say what. I don't think you'll find out.
creator: Fooler
